data.title: Russia using crypto in oil trade with China and India to skirt Western sanctions: Reuters
data.description:
Crypto represents a small but growing part of Russia's $192 billion oil trade, with companies using BTC, ETH and USDT, the sources said.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/346337/russia-crypto-oil-trade-china-india-western-sanctions-reuters?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Gold Reaches Record High as Bitcoin Maintains Strong Valuation
data.description: According to BlockBeats, gold prices have surged past $3,000 per ounce, setting a new historical record. Concurrently, Bitcoin is valued at $83,259, with a market capitalization of $1.65 trillion. This development has pushed the total market value of gold to over $22 trillion, making it 13.3 times larger than Bitcoin's market cap.

data.title: Pump.fun memecoins are dying at record rates, less than 1% survive
data.description:
The memecoin frenzy on Pump.fun is hitting a wall, with the platform’s “graduation rate” sinking below 1% for the fourth straight week.“Graduation rate” is the memecoin launchpad’s term for tokens that make it through the incubation phase and become fully tradable on a Solana decentralized exchange (DEX). To graduate, a token must meet specific liquidity and trading requirements.Over the past...
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/pump-fun-memecoins-are-dying-at-record-rates-less-than-1-survive?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: The total market value of gold has exceeded 22 trillion US dollars, about 13.3 times that of Bitcoin
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: The gold price broke through $3,000 per ounce, setting a new record high. During the same period, the price of Bitcoin was $83,259, with a total market value of $1.65 trillion.
Currently, the total market value of gold has exceeded $22 trillion, which is about 13.3 times the market value of Bitcoin.

data.title: ZKSync discontinues its Ignite incentive program due to unfavorable market conditions
data.description:
ZKSync will not launch Season 2 of its Ignite program, which aimed to boost available liquidity for DeFi. ZKSync will now focus on the Elastic Network and improve the ZK tokenomics to offset the bearish market conditions.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/zksync-discontinues-ignite-incentive-program/

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 83,000 USDT with a Narrowed 0.08% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 14, 2025, 10:41 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 83,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 83,030.0625 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.08% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: SEC Considers Labeling XRP A Commodity As High-Profile Enforcement Case Against Ripple Nears Conclusion
data.description:
It has been years of back and forth, and Ripple and the US SEC are still mired in a legal showdown, though the end might finally be in sight.
source: https://zycrypto.com/sec-considers-labeling-xrp-a-commodity-as-high-profile-enforcement-case-against-ripple-nears-conclusion/

data.title: White House Considers Expanding Bitcoin Holdings
data.description:
According to PANews, during a closed-door roundtable hosted by the Bitcoin Policy Institute on Tuesday, Bo Hines, Executive Director of the U.S. President's Digital Assets Task Force, revealed that the White House intends to acquire as much Bitcoin as possible. When asked how much Bitcoin the U.S. government might eventually purchase, Hines humorously compared the question to asking how many dollars someone would want.

A White House official confirmed Hines' statement about acquiring Bitcoin but emphasized that any such acquisitions would be conducted in a budget-neutral manner, ensuring no taxpayer money is spent. The official also noted that Hines did not endorse any specific legislation during the event.

data.title: ETH high-win rate whale sells 470,000 LINK in 40 minutes, worth $6.57 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to @ai_9684xtpa monitoring, ETH high-win rate band whales sold 470,000 LINK on the chain in nearly 40 minutes, with a total cash out of $6.57 million.
In addition, the address also withdrew 470,000 LINK from Binance at $13.94 twice to earn the difference.

data.title: Bitget was selected as a case study in a blockchain monograph by a professor at UCLA
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Alex Nascimento, a blockchain researcher and professor at the University of California, Los Angeles (UCLA), included a case study of Bitget in the fourth edition of his new book, The STO Financial Revolution. The book comprehensively analyzes blockchain, cryptocurrency and Web3 technology, explores its application in the financial field, and provides companies and investors with a practical guide to compliant fundraising.
This book, co-authored by industry experts, includes case studies from well-known institutions such as Bitget, DWF Labs, UNICEF, BTG Pactual and Polymath, showing key developments in the blockchain industry and exploring how blockchain technology is changing the global financial system. At present, the book has been adopted by many academic institutions such as UCLA as an important teaching material for digital economy-related courses.
Alex Nascimento, a blockchain professor at UCLA, said: "It is crucial for the global education system to incorporate blockchain technology and Web3 principles into the curriculum system to cultivate a new generation of talents who can adapt to the decentralized digital world. Bitget is not only a promoter of business innovation by supporting blockchain education projects, but also an important contributor to the popularization of blockchain knowledge."
